hero.headline: What you've built deserves real protection.
hero.subtitle: The right coverage starts here.
hero.description: Portugal Agency was created to ensure that families and businesses in New Jersey have access to the right coverage — with clarity, care, and service in Portuguese, Spanish, and English. We connect you to the best insurers in minutes, not hours.

foundation.label: Foundation
foundation.headline: An agency built for people like you
foundation.description: Our founder built her career understanding firsthand the challenges of those growing in New Jersey. Portugal Agency exists to be the support many never had. We know what it's like to start from scratch and we want you to go far.

faq.headline: Questions
faq.description: Answers to the most common questions about commercial insurance.

q1.a: Most quotes are processed in minutes. You enter your data once and receive offers from multiple insurers simultaneously.

q2.q: Do I need all these insurances?
q2.a: It depends on your business. Workers' Compensation is mandatory in many states. Our specialists analyze your case and recommend what you really need.

q3.q: How do you find better prices?
q3.a: We access multiple insurers and platforms at once, quickly comparing offers and negotiating the best rates for you.

q4.a: Yes. If you find a better option or your needs change, we can help you transition without complications.

oQueE.label: Essential
oQueE.headline: What is Workers' Compensation
oQueE.description: It's mandatory insurance that protects your employees when they suffer work-related injuries or illnesses. Covers medical expenses and part of the salary during leave.

tab1.label: Coverage
tab1.title: Types of coverage available
tab1.description: We offer plans covering medical expenses, rehabilitation, permanent disability compensation, and death benefits.

tab2.label: Requirements
tab2.title: Who is required to purchase it
tab2.description: Most states require Workers' Compensation for businesses with employees. In New Jersey, the requirement applies to virtually all employers.

tab3.label: Benefits
tab3.title: Why protect your team now
tab3.description: Beyond legal compliance, you protect your business from costly lawsuits, secure team loyalty, and demonstrate responsibility as an employer.

v3.description: You see all options side by side and choose what makes the most sense for your business, without complications.

hero.label: Protection
hero.headline: General Liability Insurance
hero.description: Your business protected against unexpected risks and everyday incidents.

what.label: Protection
what.headline: What is General Liability insurance
what.description: General Liability is the fundamental protection for any business. It covers expenses when your business causes harm to third parties, whether through bodily injury or property damage.

f1.title: Financial protection
f1.description: Prevents a single incident from destroying your business.

f2.title: Legal compliance
f2.description: Meets mandatory requirements in commercial contracts.

f3.title: Operational peace of mind
f3.description: Work without fear of unexpected daily risks.

f4.title: Broad coverage
f4.description: Protects against injuries, damages, and legal expenses.

faq.headline: Questions
faq.description: Answers to the most common questions about general liability protection.

q1.a: General Liability protects your business when someone gets hurt at your premises or when your products cause damage. It covers medical expenses, lawsuits, and compensation for bodily injury or third-party property damage.

q2.a: The cost varies depending on the type of business, annual revenue, and claims history. Portugal Agency compares quotes from multiple insurers to find the best price for your business.

q3.a: Virtually every business that deals with the public or has commercial property needs General Liability. From small businesses to large corporations, this insurance is essential for financial protection.

q4.a: When an incident occurs, you notify the insurer immediately. The insurer investigates, evaluates the claim, and covers costs according to your policy terms.

q5.a: Yes. You can adjust coverage limits, deductibles, and add specialized coverages based on your business's specific needs.

q1.a: Home insurance covers fire, theft, electrical damage, and natural disasters. Each policy can be customized to your specific needs.

faq.headline: Blog FAQ
faq.description: Answers to the most common questions about our content

q1.q: What's the difference between personal and commercial insurance?
q1.a: Personal insurance covers individuals and their properties, like home and car. Commercial insurance protects businesses against operational risks, liabilities, and property losses. Portugal Agency offers both.

q2.q: Why should I read about insurance?
q2.a: Our articles help you understand available coverage types, make informed decisions, and properly protect your assets. Knowledge is the best defense against unexpected risks.

q3.q: How often do you publish new articles?
q3.a: We regularly publish relevant content about market trends, protection tips, and insurance analyses. Follow our blog to stay updated.

q4.q: Can I share these articles with my company?
q4.a: Yes, our articles are valuable educational resources. Share them with your team or clients to promote better understanding of insurance protection.

q5.q: How do articles help with insurance quotes?
q5.a: By better understanding your risks and needs through our articles, you'll be more prepared to request an accurate quote suited to your reality.

coverages.label: Protection
coverages.headline: Coverage that works
coverages.description: Your vehicle deserves more than empty promises

c1.title: Liability Coverage
c1.body: Mandatory coverage that protects third parties in case of an accident — bodily injury and property damage. The legal foundation of any policy in New Jersey.

c2.title: Collision & Comprehensive
c2.body: Protects your vehicle against collisions, theft, vandalism, natural disasters, and non-accident damage. Ideal for mid- to high-value vehicles.

c3.title: Full Coverage
c3.body: Complete combination: liability, collision, comprehensive, and 24-hour roadside assistance. The broadest protection available for total peace of mind.

c4.title: 24h Roadside Assistance
c4.body: When something happens on the road, you don't want to wait. Our specialists are available around the clock to guide you through every step of the claim.

s3.description: Compare prices and coverages side by side, then sign online and be protected immediately.

faq.headline: Auto insurance FAQ
faq.description: Clear answers about coverages, deductibles, and claims procedures

q1.a: Coverage depends on your vehicle and needs. We offer everything from liability to full coverage with theft and collision protection. Our specialists help you find the right balance between protection and cost.

q2.a: The deductible is the amount you pay when making a claim. Lower deductibles mean higher premiums, and vice versa. You choose the amount that best fits your budget during the quote.

q3.q: How long does a quote take?
q3.a: Our platform compares multiple insurers in minutes. You receive options from different providers with prices and coverages side by side, saving hours of manual research.

q4.q: What to do after an accident?
q4.a: Contact us immediately after an accident. We'll guide you through every step of the claims process and ensure your situation is resolved quickly with the insurer.

q5.a: Yes, you can switch at any time. We help with the transition and ensure there are no gaps in coverage during the change from one policy to another.
